zh.lifeSummary: 當Jenkin Weaver於1473年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾時，他的父親Sir John Weaver26歲，母親Lady Jane Apleby23歲。他於1498年與Lady Marguerite Nanton在英國結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1509年在他的家鄉享年36歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jenkin Weaver于1473年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾时，他的父亲Sir John Weaver26岁，母亲Lady Jane Apleby23岁。他于1498年与Lady Marguerite Nanton在英国结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1509年在他的家乡享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: Weaver
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name, from an agent derivative of Middle English weven ‘to weave’ (Old English wefan).

English: habitational name from a place on the Weaver river in Cheshire, now called Weaver Hall but recorded simply as Weuere in the 13th and 14th centuries. The river name is from Old English wēfer(e) ‘winding stream’.

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames meaning ‘weaver’, for example German Weber , Polish and Jewish (eastern Ashkenazic) Tkacz or Tkach , Hungarian Takács (see Takacs ), and Slovenian Tkalec, Tekavec or Veber .

variants.name: Weber
meanings: German and Jewish (Ashkenazic): occupational name for a weaver, Middle High German wëber, German Weber, an agent derivative of weben ‘to weave’. This form of the surname is also established in many other parts of Europe, notably in France (mainly Alsace and Lorraine), Poland, and the Netherlands. In Hungary it is mostly spelled Wéber and Véber. In Russia, Slovenia, Czechia, Slovakia, and Croatia it is (also) established in the Slavicized form Veber , which is in Czechia also spelled Vebr. Compare Waber , Weaber , Weaver , Webber , and Webre .

History: As a name of ultimately Swiss German origin the surname Weber is also established among the American Mennonites. However, descendants of the early Mennonite settlers, who came to PA in the early 18th century, mostly bear the Americanized form of the name (see Weaver ).

nameMeanings.name: Jenkin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Transferred use of the surname, which is derived from the medieval given name Jankin. This was a pet form of the boy's name Jan , with the diminutive suffix -kin. The modern given name is popular in Wales, where the surnames Jenkin and Jenkins are common.

en.lifeSummary: When Jenkin Weaver was born in 1473, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Sir John Weaver, was 26 and his mother, Lady Jane Apleby, was 23. He married Lady Marguerite Nanton in 1498, in England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. He died in 1509, in his hometown, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jenkin Weaver est né en 1473, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir John Weaver, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Lady Jane Apleby, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Lady Marguerite Nanton en 1498, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1509, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jenkin Weaver 1473 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Weaver 26 und seine Mutter Lady Jane Apleby 23. Er hat 1498 in England Lady Marguerite Nanton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1509 im Alter von 36 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jenkin Weaver è nato il nel 1473 nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir John Weaver, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Lady Jane Apleby, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Lady Marguerite Nanton nel 1498, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1509, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Jenkin Weaverが1473年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John Weaverは26歳，母Lady Jane Aplebyは23歳であった。1498年にイギリスでLady Marguerite Nantonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1509年に故郷で36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Jenkin Weaver(이)가 1473년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Weaver(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Jane Apleby(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1498년 영국에서 Lady Marguerite Nanton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1509년 그의 고향에서 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jenkin Weaver nasceu em 1473, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir John Weaver, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Lady Jane Apleby, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Marguerite Nanton em 1498, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1509, em sua cidade natal, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jenkin Weaver родился в 1473 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir John Weaver было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Jane Apleby, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Marguerite Nanton в 1498 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1509 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jenkin Weaver nació en 1473, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir John Weaver, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Lady Jane Apleby, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Lady Marguerite Nanton en 1498, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1509, en su pueblo, a la edad de 36 años.
